wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Bound Phylactery|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Summon|2}}{{R|Bound Phylactery||2}} is the  {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Starter|Starter|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} of the {{2|Necrobinder}}.

<!-- unconfirmed, im assumin :3 -->

== Sources ==
The {{2|Necrobinder}} will always start every new run with this relic in her possession.

== Spawn Restrictions==
Can only be obtained by the {{2|Necrobinder}}.

== Interactions ==
* While this relic is equipped, {{2|Osty}} will always spawn with 1 HP at the beginning of every turn during combat if he was not already summoned at the beginning of the turn.

* '''Bound Phylactery''' can be upgraded to {{R|Phylactery Unbound||2}} if the player chooses the offering {{R|Touch of Orobas||2}} while meeting with the {{2|Ancient}} {{2|Orobas}}, at the beginning of {{2|Act 2}}.

=== Order ===
<!-- Include any notable ordering here, example Dead Branch and Dark Embrace. If this is a card with Weak/Vuln + Strength/Vigor etc kind of ordering (example Wreath of Flame), uncomment the next comment. 
Note: Additive: Strength, Vigor, anything with +1
      Multiplicative: Weak, Vuln, Wrath, Divinity, Phantasmal's double damage, Lock-On, anything with %
-->

<!--
When calculating damage dealt, all the additive bonuses are added first, and then multiplicative bonuses are multiplied. The final result is rounded down. '''RELICNAME''''s {{KW|BONUSNAME}} is an additive/multiplicative bonus, (you can remove this part if irrelevant) and stacks with (most common synergy).
-->

=== Synergies ===
* Synergizes well with {{C|Unleash||2}} and {{C|Protector||2}}, since {{KW|Summon||2}} raises {{2|Osty}}'s max HP.
* Stacks with {{C|Invoke||2}}, summoning Osty with 3/4 HP total on the next turn if he was knocked out on the previous turn.
* With this relic, you will always get a minimum of 2 {{KW|Block||2}} from {{C|Sacrifice||2}}.
